---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The idea**
What you'd like to see.

**Why**
The problem it solves or the fun it adds.

**Which layer**
CLI / hooks / Electron overlay / docs

**Notes**
Keep in mind: the core stays dependency-free, hooks must never block Claude, and
the tone stays playful (not cruel).
